metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for research, development, security, and Vue.js architecture

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Web and Youtube research agents with vector store integration

plugins.name: development-tools
plugins.description: Tooling to help with development tasks, such as code generation, debugging, and testing.

plugins.name: security-tools
plugins.description: Security review agents and dependency scanning for vulnerability detection

plugins.name: vue-tools
plugins.description: Vue.js architecture guidance, component design patterns, and best practices

plugins.name: orientation-tools
plugins.description: Codebase orientation skills for mapping structure, interactive exploration, task-driven learning, and health analysis before large changes

plugins.name: personal-context
plugins.description: Personal identity and preferences MCP server — contacts, communication style, and context files. Infrastructure layer used by all other plugins.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Strategic orchestration layer — daily briefings, weekly planning, and end-of-day wrap-up. Coordinates exec-assistant, project-manager, and personal-context plugins.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Project planning and tracking — creates project plans, monitors health against Todoist, and maintains the project index. Owns the project folder schema.

plugins.name: exec-assistant
plugins.description: Executive assistant layer — meeting prep, transcript processing, meeting memory, email prioritization, and autonomous Todoist @claude task dispatch via exec-monitor

plugins.name: thinking-partner
plugins.description: Thinking partner — guides content digestion into atomic Zettelkasten notes with connections, tagging, and Obsidian vault integration.
